elements.title: Makeship
elements.contents: ... that Makeship produced a plush toy of Wikipedia's 25th-anniversary mascot (pictured)?

elements.title: Sudjarwo Tjondronegoro
elements.contents: ... that Sudjarwo Tjondronegoro advanced Indonesia's claim to Western New Guinea in the United Nations, and later accepted control over the territory?

elements.title: The Patriot's Progress
elements.contents: ... that Henry Williamson stopped writing The Patriot's Progress for a year because he was so disgusted by the praise for All Quiet on the Western Front?

elements.title: Kwek Leng Beng
elements.contents: ... that Kwek Leng Beng was gifted a gold-dipped AK-47 by Al Waleed bin Talal Al Saud after they jointly purchased the Plaza Hotel from Donald Trump?

elements.title: formal semantics
elements.contents: ... that formal semantics uses logic and mathematics to study language?

elements.title: Cobb
elements.contents: ... that Lee Blessing called his baseball play Cobb a "one-man play for four men"?

elements.title: James Stanley Rogers
elements.contents: ... that James Stanley Rogers was the secretary of a panel that oversaw the production of optical munitions in Australia during the Second World War?

elements.title: K50 Waterfall
elements.contents: ... that Vietnam's K50 Waterfall is named after its height?

elements.title: Mohongo-class gunboats
elements.contents: ... that the seven Mohongo-class gunboats were uncharacteristically comfortable?
